---
title: "Divij Chokhani"
subtitle: "Master's Student in Business Analytics at UC San Diego"
image: "files/my_photo.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:dchokhani@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/divijchokhani
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/rsm-dchokhani
---

Welcome to my website!
I am a Master's student in Business Analytics at the Rady School of Management, University of California, San Diego. I have a strong background in data science and machine learning, and I am passionate about applying these skills to solve real-world business problems.
